SuperLED.isOnScreen: Compares the image on the screen with another image.
SuperLED.setRandom: Randomly turns on the specified LEDs.
SuperLED.setRandom|param|leds: the LEDs to randomly turn on
SuperLED.areOn: Checks if all the specified LEDs are turned on.
SuperLED.areOff: Checks if all the specified LEDs are turned off.
